faqs.q: How much does Philips Everflo 5 Liter Oxygen Concentrator cost in India?
faqs.a: The price of Philips Respironics Everflo oxygen concentrator is Rs 49,699 on Oxygen Times which is the lowest online price in India.

faqs.q: Where can I buy a Philips Everflo oxygen concentrator in India?
faqs.a: You can buy a Philips Eveflo oxygen concentrator from Oxygen Times with 3 years warranty. On average, it takes approximately 24-48 hours to deliver the product pan India.

description_text:
Philips Respironics Everflo 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrator

Philips Respironics Everflo is the most popular home oxygen concentrator that provides a continuous flow of 0.5-5 LPM with oxygen purity of 93% (+/- 3%) at all flow rates.

Lightweight and Easy to Transport: Everflo weighs just 14 kgs and comes with a compact design that can be easily carried or driven using its wheels and top handle.

Sound Level: The machine emits sound at 40 dB, the lowest among all the concentrators.

Lowest Power Consumption: Everflo consumes just 350 watts of power making it energy-efficient and budget-friendly in the long run.

Operating Altitude: The operating altitude of Philips Respironics Everflo is 7500 ft or 2286 m which allows it to be used for patients who live at a higher altitude

Oxygen Purity Indicator: To prevent any unforeseen situation, the machine comes with an Oxygen Purity Indicator or OPI that lights up if the oxygen purity level of the machine reaches below 82%.

Warranty: Philips Respironics Everflo comes with a 3 years warranty in India. 

Approvals and Certifications: FDA-approved and CE certified

What's in the box?


	Phillips Everflo 5 LPM Oxygen Concentrator 
	Nasal Cannula (Optional)
	Humidifier Bottle (Optional)
	Power Cable
	User Manual
